note: Alternate Minor-degree count (2026-07-12, explicit user request): the auto count validates a complete impulse 2025-07-31..2025-10-29, then can't build a valid new one through the 2026-01-28 high (a hypothesis starting at the 2025-11-21 low breaks the wave-2 rule at 2026-03-30), so it draws 2025-11-21/2026-01-28 as unlabeled real turns -- a visible gap. This reading instead treats 2025-10-29's high as wave 3 (not 5), 2025-11-21 as wave 4, and 2026-01-28 as wave 5 -- landing exactly on the Intermediate (1) top, matching Elliott's fractal-nesting expectation (a degree's wave 1 top IS the finer degree's completing wave 5). Checked against the hard rules: wave 3 (70.41pts) is not the shortest of 1/3/5 (wave 5 at 46.99pts is); wave 4 (650.85) does not enter wave 1's territory (481.80-639.85); wave 5 (697.84) exceeds wave 3 (689.70) -- not truncated, unlike the auto reading's own wave 5. Orange (#ff9f43) to stay distinct from Minor's own auto blue (#4a7dff) and every other EW_DEGREES color. Coexists with the auto count -- the auto wave 3/4 (both 2025-10-10, a same-day whipsaw) could not be cleanly hidden/relabeled via the OVERRIDE system, since it keys strictly on (scale, date) and both share one date.
